programme.desc: Two high-school students (Kathryn Bernardo, Daniel Padilla) pretend to date to make one's ex-girlfriend jealous, then they do fall in love.

programme.title: Small Medium Large
programme.desc: Junior, Pol and Fernando, men of different sizes, meet at a restaurant and become friends. They look for permanent solutions to solve their problems as jobless individuals.

programme.desc: Two twins get separated at birth and grow up in vastly different backgrounds: one is raised by a general, while the other ends up under the care of a thug.

programme.desc: Two childhood friends with juvenile records grow up to live very different lives. One becomes a priest, while the other ends up being a criminal.

programme.title: Jack en Poy
programme.desc: Jack, a young boy, and Poy, a girl, are sworn to each other in an arranged marriage. However, years later, Poy grows up to be a tomboy and Jack comes out as gay.

programme.title: Cedie
programme.desc: An American boy finds out that he is the sole heir to a British earldom and leaves New York to live in his ancestral castle. His grandfather intends to teach him to become an aristocrat, but the boy, inadvertently teaches him compassion.

programme.title: Momshies! Ang Soul Mo'y Akin!
programme.desc: Three dissatisfied women learn the value of love and families when their souls become accidentally switched.

programme.title: Magandang Hatinggabi

programme.title: Kusina Kings
programme.desc: Best friends Benjie and Ronnie challenge their rival to a cooking competition in an attempt to make their restaurant more popular. However, things do not go the way they plan.

programme.title: Mano po 6: A Mother's Love

programme.title: Momshies! Ang Soul Mo'y Akin!
programme.desc: Three dissatisfied women learn the value of love and families when their souls become accidentally switched.

programme.title: Way Back Home
programme.desc: A newlywed couple comes to their new home, with new hopes and dreams. However, one day a phone call to the wife resurfaces the incident that caused trouble to the family ten years ago.

programme.title: Bukas Bibitayin si Itay
programme.desc: An ex-convict who loves his family is wrongly accused of killing a man who was abusing his wife. The ex-convict is pursued and brought to the court by the mayor who is also the brother of the deceased man.

programme.title: Rosa Mistica
programme.desc: An anthology of three stories featuring a rose that helps a woman come back to life, a mysterious heir who hides a disturbing secret, and a magical mirror that has the power to make people beautiful.

programme.desc: Inday fights with Baldomero's family for silly reasons. Baldomero finds a magical amulet that allows him to clone anyone.

programme.title: The Goldbergs S4
programme.desc: Erica and Adam both take the lead from TV’s “The Brady Bunch” and “George Glass” their crushes. Adam risks bodily harm in an intense game of paintball, and Erica might be embarrassed when her friends see through her fake college-aged boyfriend. Meanwhile, Murray’s stubbornness causes Beverly to miss seeing the Beach Boys at Live Aid.

programme.title: Survivor S50

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: It's Andy's birthday, and wouldn't you know it, what with all the lounging and the resting and the napping, Rodney totally forgot!

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2
programme.desc: A giant, mysterious crate awaits the chefs in the kitchen and things take a hairy turn when they discover some surprising guests will be doing the shopping for them today! Animal expert and conservationist Jeff Corwin stops by to introduce the chefs to some wild animal ambassadors that send the chefs on a global, culinary adventure to cook meals inspired by different regions of the world.

programme.title: Ruby And The Well S2
programme.desc: A new wish leads Ruby to reunite a family.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2
programme.desc: A vigilante group has been freeing EVOS from captivity. When Rex is sent to investigate, he discovers things work differently in the jungle.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2
programme.desc: To help Noah get closer to a girl, Rex constructs an elaborate haunted house with the hope of scaring her into his friend's arms.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision. The chefs must make this formidable dinner for not just these Kaiseki masters, but in celebration of the Tokyo games with Olympic medalists Diana Taurasi, Rai Benjamin, Nastia Liukin, Ibtihaj Muhammad, Christian Coleman, Kerri Walsh Jennings and NBC Olympic Primetime Host Mike Tirico. The gold medal meal takes place at the iconic Los Angeles Coliseum with Padma, Tom, Nilou Motamed and Niki & Carole Lidi-Nakayama at the judges table.

programme.title: Happily Ever After: Fairy Tales For Every Child S1
programme.desc: Whoopi Goldberg really lets her hair down as Zenobia, the Hoodoo Diva, who keeps Rapunzel locked in a high tower in the bayou.

programme.title: Pan
programme.desc: An orphan is spirited away to a magical land, where he finds both fun and dangers, and discovers his destiny — to become the hero who will be known as Peter Pan.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: Lumpus becomes paranoid when he thinks Lazlo has discovered his secret handshake.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: The Beans Scouts and the Squirrel Scouts go skiing, and Lazlo and Lumpus discover that the mountain isn't big enough for the both of them.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: Skip and Chip have a big fight, and it's up to Lazlo to get them back together again.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: All the campers vie to become Camp Kidney's newest mascot; unfortunately, there can be only one winner.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: Edward 'earns' enough badges to become the first camper ever to graduate from Camp Kidney--but does he want to go?

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: Edward gets bit by a wood gnome, and he discovers that this is no little mosquito bite!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Andy thinks being a pet is easy. Rodney thinks being a pet owner is easy. To prove they're both wrong, they switch!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney seek the advice of Grandpa Squirrel to get out of a dangerous dare.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: At the grocery store, Rodney feeds Andy some food samples that Andy is allergic to, causing him to bloat up like a giant ball.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: To boost his best chum's spirits, Rodney lets Andy win a round of their favorite game, Flying King Footloaf.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Mr. J and Andy exclude Rodney from their club, so he hangs out with Mrs. J's ladies group.

programme.title: Ruby And The Well S2
programme.desc: Ruby’s latest wish vision appears to be missing an actual wish!

programme.title: Generator Rex S2
programme.desc: Rex teams up with a pair of Providence Academy dropouts in their freelance EVO-busting business.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2
programme.desc: Noah needs a new table tennis partner if he's going to compete at the state championships, so Rex enrolls in school to join the team.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: Tom makes his final decision from Last Chance Kitchen on who should return to the competition. Then the chefs take off in a Quickfire with Padma and Jonathan Waxman making a two-course Business-Class dish for an airline. For their final challenge in Los Angeles before jetting off to Italy for the finale, the chefs go to Michael’s Santa Monica, where they meet Chef and Restaurateur Michael McCarty, the legendary pioneer of California Cuisine. With only five chefs moving onto the finals, the chefs will have to reimagine one of Michael’s iconic dishes from across the years and serve it to a table of celebrated alumni of Michael’s kitchen, including Roy Yamaguchi, Jonathan Waxman, Sang Yoon, Mark Peel and Brooke Williamson.

programme.title: Harry Potter And The Prisoner Of Azkaban
programme.desc: Harry, Ron and Hermione return as teenagers for a third term at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry and must face a dangerous convict.

programme.title: Harry Potter And The Goblet Of Fire
programme.desc: A competition will be held between three schools of wizardry. The Goblet of Fire makes its final selection for the competition - Harry Potter.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: Tom makes his final decision from Last Chance Kitchen on who should return to the competition. programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2
programme.desc: Head Judge Curtis Stone puts the chefs to the ultimate test when they must keep up with him to perfectly re-create one of his signature dishes. Then, there’s magic in the air as the chefs take up their wands and are transported to the Wizarding World for a fantastic feast inspired by Harry Potter. Each chef is filled with joy to create a celebratory feast using whole game birds, which they’ll serve in a Top Chef Junior Dining Room transformed into the Great Hall. Gail Simmons & game meats expert, Tim Love, are the guest judges… and for the first time in Top Chef Junior history, our chefs sit down with the judges’ to share a meal!

programme.desc: A man searches the world for a set of mystic artifacts. The twelve bronze heads of the animals from the Chinese zodiac.

programme.title: Final Justice
programme.desc: A cop relies on a young car thief to take down four gangsters who plan to rob a rich merchant

programme.title: Ruthless
programme.desc: A high school coach, whose teenage daughter was murdered, takes matters into his own hands by going after the men who kidnapped his student for their human trafficking operation.

programme.title: Bad Man
programme.desc: Na Yoo-Mi , was found dead because of an accident according to police report. But her husband, Han Byung-Do believes that it was related to Baek Dong-II, so he go after Baek Dong-II for revenge.

programme.title: Exceptional Engineering S2
programme.desc: The protected transport of emergency and special forces personnel is its raison d’être. The police forces’ special service vehicles are designed for breaking barricades and other obstacles.

programme.title: Exceptional Engineering S2
programme.desc: Electricity harnessed from wind has become the second largest source of energy in Germany since 2017. Nearly 30,000 wind turbines are operating throughout the country, covering approx. 19 percent of energy consumption.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Being just that little bit different, can bring huge advantages, but it also presents almighty challenges. By going against the grain, these animals have found unique ways to stay alive.

programme.title: Into The Puma Triangle
programme.desc: Casey Anderson, a Montana native wildlife expert works with wildlife filmmaker René Araneda to capture the wild pumas of Torres del Paine National Park in Chilean Patagonia. Together, they have filmed things seen nowhere else in the world that will unlock the mystery of the puma’s true nature.

programme.title: The Secret Life Of Owls
programme.desc: This stunning series uncovers 'The Secret Life Of Owls' as never seen before, using a special camera rig to follow families of owls in a wild corner of rural Essex, through winter, spring and summer.

programme.title: Cheese, A Love Story
programme.desc: Afrim takes a mini cheese trip around the world in his own backyard, Toronto, one of the most diverse and cultural cities on the planet.

programme.title: Cheese, A Love Story
programme.desc: Afrim’s cheese quest continues in Greece, the motherland of Feta, and where cheese culture dates back thousands of years in ancient practices.

programme.title: Cheese, A Love Story
programme.desc: Afrim’s final stop is beautiful British Columbia, Canada’s West coast, where an innovative cheese culture is driven by its ‘support local’ mentality.

programme.title: Artist To Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Robin Williams’ Dead Poets Society co-star Gale Hansen, Mork & Mindy writer David Misch, friend and comedian Rick Overton, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist To Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Madonna’s first manager Camille Barbone, dancer Carlton Wilborn, Evita studio executive Lauren Lloyd, plus many more.

programme.title: Neymar: Brazil's Number One
programme.desc: From the streets of Santos to becoming Brazil's number one goal scorer, the 20-year journey of Neymar is one for the history books. Having played football on nearly every continent, Neymar will go down as a legend of the game, forever.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Every spring in Norway, whales use a clever hunting technique called “bubble feeding” to catch quantities of herring. When they spot a shoal of herring, they begin to encircle the herring, periodically releasing streams of bubbles that form a curtain of air, surrounding the fish.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Marine biologists Eve Jourdain and Richard Kaoliussen have spent two years studying the orcas in Norway, where they have adapted the carrousel technique to their habitat.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: In the depths of the ocean, swift and agile sea lions perform incredible underwater maneuvers to outwit their enemies. Here, on the beaches of Patagonia, as a sea lion pup learns to swim, predators are preparing an attack on him, one that will be fatal.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Cape Gannets are tough hunters flying over the coasts for their favorite prey: shoals of sardines, waiting for a surprising ally: dolphins.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Under the burning sun of Cape Cross, large colonies of seals gather on Namibia's Skeleton Coast...The males, who can weigh up to 360 kg, patrol the territory to protect their females and young. But new predators are coming from the land, forcing them to learn new defense behaviors.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: In the heart of the Valdees Peninsula, in Patagonia, whales are regularly hunted by a predator whose diminutive size hides its gruesome intentions: the seagull, forcing whales to dive deep into the depths, away from essential oxygen and light.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: In Chile's Torres del Paine melt from snow-covered mountains feeds finger-like fjords as they reach out to the sea to join the current lowering its salinity. Rivers estuaries and wetlands are home to many wading birds and the countless inlets and bays are magnets for rare dolphins and orcas.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: The Humboldt Current is slower than most ocean currents but it’s the most dynamic in the world because it travels for such a long distance. Upwelling from the deepest trenches brings nutrients to the surface allowing phytoplankton to bloom laying the foundation for an intricate marine food chain

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: The current is followed by a unique population of Chilean blue whales and is the last refuge for other extremely rare marine mammals. From the chill of its deepest depths to the wind on its highest cliffs the current creates unusual habitats and is a study in survival.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, Mike Davidson is on streets, in tunnels, on tracks and in trolley restoration garages - working shoulder-to-shoulder with the team that keeps one of America's largest and oldest mass transit systems running smoothly and on time.

programme.title: Mega Transports Specials
programme.desc: A unique mega transport made of steel and titanium with a special purpose: to extract tons of gold. This so-called autoclave is the biggest of its kind.

programme.title: Mega Transports Specials
programme.desc: This giant magnet will revolutionize the world and energy production in the future. The world's largest nuclear fusion reactor is currently under construction in southern France.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: Jim Carrey and Cameron Diaz star in this story of a sweet, socially inept bank teller who discovers a mask that transforms him into a superhero ... but one whom you may not want to call for help.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Po is a dreamer who must embrace his true self in order to become the Dragon Warrior. Filled with high-kicking humor and an all-star cast.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A bounty hunter learns that his next target is his ex-wife.

programme.title: The Russia House
programme.desc: A British publisher is sent a manuscript detailing Soviet Union nuclear missile capabilities. British Intelligence intercept it and recruit him to investigate the author's editor, a beautiful Russian woman he claims never to have met.

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: A virtuous Hong Kong Police Officer must clear his good name when the drug lord he is after frames him for the murder of a dirty cop.

programme.title: Return Of The Seven
programme.desc: Yul Brynner returns as the good guy dressed in black who calls on five gunfighters (including Robert Fuller, Warren Oates and Claude Akins) to defend a town under siege by vicious outlaws.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Po is a dreamer who must embrace his true self in order to become the Dragon Warrior. Filled with high-kicking humor and an all-star cast.

programme.title: The Russia House

programme.title: Return Of The Seven
programme.desc: Yul Brynner returns as the good guy dressed in black who calls on five gunfighters (including Robert Fuller, Warren Oates and Claude Akins) to defend a town under siege by vicious outlaws.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S2)
programme.desc: Curtis Reeves stands accused of murdering Chad Oulson over popcorn at a matinee movie. The defence claims he acted in self-defence—that Oulson was the aggressor.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder (S1)
programme.desc: When Toni meets Harold at a medical convention, they click and soon marry. But when money starts going missing from Toni's account, suspicion falls on Harold.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: An undercover NYPD officer and an ATF special agent learn firsthand not to trust a suspect's demeanour, regardless of how amicable it may appear.

programme.title: Women On Death Row
programme.desc: Linda Carty was sentenced to death on February 19, 2001 for the kidnapping of three-day-old newborn Ray Cabrera, and the kidnapping and murder of his mother, Joana Rodriguez.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6)
programme.desc: After a construction company boss is found shot dead, no arrests are made. An employee says he'd been bound and gagged by a gang just before the shooting. But 14 years later police charge him with murder.

programme.title: Witness To Murder: Digital Evidence
programme.desc: After the gruesome murder of an aspiring actor in Georgia, police quickly run out of leads. But a new digital forensic tool breathes new life into the investigation.

programme.title: City Confidential (S8)
programme.desc: People in charming Hope Mills, are on edge when a high school freshman vanishes while on her way to meet a friend. When she turns up dead three weeks later, the community rallies to flush out the killer.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2)
programme.desc: A man risks his life to save his wife during a home invasion; two convenience store workers defend their workplace; a hairdresser is put in an unpredictable situation; and more.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2)
programme.desc: A longstanding feud comes to a head when two neighbours confront each other with guns; a school bus driver goes on a dangerous high-speed chase to outrun an irate parent who attacks her bus with a hammer.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: OJ’s behaviour sparks a media frenzy, culminating in a high-profile trial. His ongoing violence raises concerns about what happened to Sydney and Justin.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: Kelsey's family knew something was amiss when their usually responsible and responsive daughter didn't respond to their texts while out running an errand.

programme.title: Women On Death Row
programme.desc: Melissa Lucio was sentenced to death for the murder of her two-year-old daughter, Mariah, and in January 2022 she was given an official execution date of April 27, 2022.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: In Epping, New Hampshire, Sheila LaBarre was known as an eccentric widow who loved her rabbits. But her turbulent childhood, a coma-induced vision, and her husband's death sent Sheila on a mission to kill.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Elizabeth Thomas Story with Elizabeth Smart
programme.desc: Five years after she was groomed and abducted by the most popular teacher in school, Elizabeth Thomas shares new revelations about her ordeal, with famed kidnapping survivor Elizabeth Smart.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel
programme.desc: January 5, 2016, Baltimore, MD. Police officers respond to a report of a deceased man found at the Deluxe Plaza Motel in Northeast Baltimore.

programme.title: Witness To Murder: Digital Evidence
programme.desc: Police quickly identify a suspect in the murder of a local college professor, but a bombshell piece of technology stolen from the crime scene then points them in a completely different direction.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S2)
programme.desc: When an entire family is found in a decaying pile of bodies by the side of a Florida road, the hunt is on to find what police fear might be two more victims, Adam Matos and his four-year-old autistic son.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It?
programme.desc: A man is killed instantly after a head-on collision with a young mother driving home from a late-night shift at a Florida hotel. The Prosecution allege she was under the influence and caused the crash.

programme.desc: Police reopen the cold case murder of a young Marine who was killed in a hotel room and charge the woman who was with him at the time. Is she the mastermind behind his death or an innocent victim?

programme.title: Grade 1 Math
programme.desc: Know more about time and nonstandard units of length, mass, and capacity, as well as pictographs without scales and outcomes of an event.

programme.title: Grade 1 Reading & Literacy
programme.desc: Identify what are action and describing words, how to sort and classify words, and how to follow directions.

programme.title: Grade 1 Makabansa
programme.desc: Alamin ang konsepto ng distansya sa paglalarawan ng sariling kapaligirang ginagalawan tulad ng tahanan at paaralan at ng kahalagahan ng pagpapanatili at pangangalaga nito.

programme.title: Grade 2 Filipino
programme.desc: Aralin ang pagpapantig, pagbibigay ng kahulugan sa mga salita, pagbuo ng mga pangungusap, pagbabasa ng teksto, at kung ano ang mga pang-ukol, pang-abay, at salitang kilos.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Understand more about time, standard measures of length, mass and capacity and area through square-tile units, alongside pictographs with and without scales.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Identify pronouns and prepositions, and how to read, match, and write words that use short vowels.

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Pahalagahan ang kagalingang pansibiko bilang pakikibahagi sa mga layunin ng sariling komunidad.

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa pangngalan, panghalip, at iba't ibang elemento ng kuwento, at kung paano magsulat ng kuwento at magbigay ng kahulugan ng mga salita.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Know how to convert time, what are the linear, mass and capacity measures, the area of square and rectangle, bar graphs, and outcomes of an event.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Learn more about adjectives, adverbs, maps, graphs, how to read words, and how to restate facts from texts.

programme.title: Grade 3 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang mga gawaing pangkabuhayan at bahaging ginagampanan ng pamahalaan at ang mga kasapi nito, mga pinuno at iba pang naglilingkod tungo sa pagkakaisa, kaayusan at kaunlaran ng mga lalawigan sa kinabibilangang rehiyon.

programme.title: Grade 3 Science
programme.desc: Find out more about people, animals, plants, landforms and bodies of water, and their importance. Discover the types and effects of weather as they relate to daily activities, health and safety, and the natural objects in the sky affect one’s daily activities.

programme.title: Grade 4 Filipino
programme.desc: Maliwanagan sa iba't ibang uri ng pangungusap at paggamit ng balangkas sa pagpapakita ng impormasyon, at kung paano magpahayag ng sariling opinyon o reaksyon.

programme.title: Grade 4 Math
programme.desc: Know more about the concept of area and volume of triangles, parallelograms and trapezoids, and what are bar graphs and simple experiments.

programme.title: Grade 4 English
programme.desc: Learn how to write short stories, journals, and the different sources of information.

programme.title: Grade 4 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Unawain at pahalagahan ang mga karapatan at tungkulin bilang mamamayang Filipino.

programme.title: Grade 4 Science
programme.desc: Discover different types of soil, sources of water suitable for human consumption, components of weather using simple instruments, and how the Sun is the main source of heat and light on Earth.

programme.title: Grade 7 Filipino
programme.desc: Suriin ang iba't ibang akda ayon sa mga tauhan, kaisipan, at saloobin na nakapaloob dito, at alamin kung paano magsulat ng sariling pananaw at ideya tungkol sa napakinggan.

programme.title: Grade 7 Math
programme.desc: Learn the key concepts, uses, and importance of statistics, data collection/gathering and the different forms of data representation, measures of central tendency, measures of variability, and probability.

programme.title: Grade 7 English

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: While life in the idyllic town of Marlow has just about returned to normal after a chain of murders rattled the tightly knit community, it’s not long before retired archaeologist Judith Potts, dog-walker Suzie Harris, and Vicar’s wife Becks Starling are called back into action to solve a series of new crimes that befall the local residents.

programme.title: The Good Ship Murder S1 - EP 1

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 3 关键证人
programme.desc: Guo Ying and company rescue Hannah's sister. Hannah reveals that Kwon Seung-hyun's business partner Gong Jung-hoon is the real murderer and police arrests him. Yu Xuan's aunt Mei Ru agrees to help her online lover transfer a parcel. Turns out the parcel contains drugs, and she is arrested for suspected drug dealing. Yu Xuan seeks Guo Ying's help in tracking down the drug trafficking organisation.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 4 关键证人
programme.desc: While investigating a case, Ying Jie finds the passport of Yu Wen Guang, who should have been dead for years. Yu Wen Guang was the informant of Ying Jie's mother, Tang Mei Xiu. She was killed while having a rendezvous with him for a drug-dealing case. Guo Ying, Yu Xuan and Zhi Ming investigates the bungalow where his bones were discovered, and finds another set of bones!

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 9 我的左邻右里
programme.desc: Wei Ren and his competitor do a presentation to fight for the rights of being the appointed agency of Mei Hao Yuan En Bloc project. Wei Ren has Yan Xun's support and hence is confident that his company will win. However, Yan Xun does not cast his crucial vote to Wei Ren, which results in Wei Ren losing the deal. Wei Ren is shocked and feels betrayed.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 10 我的左邻右里
programme.desc: With the encouragement of Yan Xun, Jia Ying decides to confess to Wei Ren. However, Jia Ying catches Wei Ren off guard and Wei Ren does not know how to react to the confession. He quickly finds an excuse to leave the place. Jia Ying is disappointed. Wei Ren is worried for leaving Jia Ying behind, hence, he calls 'Ji Dan Zai' to accompany her. Jia Ying is unable to tolerate 'Ji Dan Zai's pester and vents all her anger on him.

programme.title: Bountiful Blessings - EP 13 万福楼
programme.desc: Fuxi wants to sell Wan Fu Lou. Pin Hong asks that Fuxi sells Wan Fu Lou to her. Fuxi refuses and believes that Dafeng wouldn't agree. However when confronted, Dafeng says all decisions can be made by Pin Hong. Fuxi is disappointed. Unknown to anyone, Pin Hong has cast a love spell on Dafeng and he is now under her control.

programme.title: Bountiful Blessings - EP 14 万福楼
programme.desc: Fuxi returns to Wan Fu Lou to take her letters, and sees Wan Fu Lou under renovations. A board falls, and in a bid to save Fuxi. Dafeng pushes her away. They kiss accidentally. This lifts the love spell and Dafeng realizes what Pin Hong has done to him.

programme.title: Highway to Somewhere - EP 8 一路惊魂
programme.desc: The Lost Four follows a car driven by a shady man in sunglasses. Dingding hits the brakes suddenly when the man’s car swerves towards theirs. As they are regaining their composure, the man walks up to their car and bangs their window. He warns them with a threatening tone to watch the road or suffer the deadly consequences of an accident.
